item.description: Stolen from the YouTube channel "UnsightlyOpinions" which is all about educating people who aren't blind about what it's like to be blind. https://www.youtube.com/@UnsightlyOpinions

item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: My Cake Day; 1 of my 1st Posts (New ideas - Don't Give Up on Yours)
item.description:
A cast you can shower in
Foot placards for women to walk across grates in heels
Bristles strips which can be added to bathroom doors to eliminate those "privacy gaps" which bother some restroom users
School hallways painted so kids don't run, improving safety and reducing accidents
"Seat Savers" you can buy to leave on your seat. Imagine coming back to your airport or other seat and leaving this marker. No one steals your seat!
Don't want temptation? Kids bug you while the cashier is ringing you up? This grocery store knows your pain and has 2-3 aisles with no candy.
Some parking garages paint the lines up the walls. Making it easier for you to park and get it right the first time.
For those who want family dinner to be without mobile phones, these "cell phone cells" are cute and give you 15 minutes of family time with conversation, not clicks.
Why fill your home with night lights when you can have rechargeable slippers with LED lights on the end?
If there's a fire, you should be on the floor. Some companies and governments have started to put the Evacuation Plan on the floor .. which is where you should be.
Proctor & Gamble realizes they cannot remove all those "suspicious" chemicals from your products. They have purposes. So why not put the purpose right next to the chemical? Now you know they're not trying to kill you.
A family vet realized some visitors are in mourning so they light this candle as a signal to other visitors. If you're mourning a little family friend's passing, you don't want to hear about the next person's cat having Montezuma's Revenge! Peace and quiet.
If you're in the theatre and just gotta go, the theatre wants you to be able to see some previews. ( Sorry it's not the part of the movie you're missing )
If Redbox can do it, why can't a pizzeria? Yes. These machines actually bake fresh pizza. Note: Originally I posted these were frozen pizzas but they are NOT. So cool! Thanks @outtaleftfield for the comment turning me on to the "fresh" aspect and this video. https://youtu.be/7ZzRL_9_zJA
For those who really take their nutrition seriously, some restaurants are now giving you the total on your bill. Not the total due, the total calories. Eat smarter.
What if you didn't have to check which doors are closed and which are actually occupied? This restroom in a European airport tells where which stalls are free and which are occupied. Every moment counts when you GOTTA go - meaning catch a flight.
Sometimes you want help and sometimes you don't. This grocery store figured out how to help the shoppers who want help .. and how to avoid annoying those who don't.
Recently a contractor realized he was installing more outlets when what people really wanted was more charging stations. This neat solution made him some bucks WITHOUT running more wires all over.
If you hit the SNOOZE button you might miss work or that meeting or that class. This alarm clock will run off the table and around the room forcing you to get up and get that heart going. Time to get up.
A shopping cart which tells you the route which avoids snacks, candy and junk food. For those who are weak to temptation.
Some store owners would love more doggie owners to visit. But they can't allow the dogs in. So this neat solution gives you somewhere to leave your pooch while you shop.
This store invites you to give your kid a free healthy snack. Also less complaints from the kids when you fill the cart with real food, not junk.
You know this beach is clean now, don't you? COFFEE!!
This solution for men with mustaches is not actually new. It seems this mug design from the 1800's is back in style in some places.
This grocery store hated to throw away those bananas turning brown or black. And some shoppers needed banana bread ingredients. Great solution!
When you were a kid wouldn't you love to have seen this next to the stairs your parents were taking?
You know you don't want to flush the toilet in a public restroom. And the owners / government really wish you would. This nifty flush for feet is fantastic !
Doggo & Kitty tax I learned 5 things in the 3 years. These aren't advice. Just grateful my life is a little better from being here on Imgur. 1: Getting offended doesn't make me right. 2: Feeling like a victim doesn't make me one. 3: BEING a victim doesn't make me a hero. 4: Stuff learnt by me often doesn't work for others. 5: Post stuff to HELP someone smile not to MAKE them smile. Don't take responsibility if they do or blame myself if they don't. My enemy is despair, not other Imgurians. Sometimes I have to re-learn the lessons. I can be VERY thick. As I often say, I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk at some point today, from this post or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.dc:creator: MayMayz4DayzYo

item.title: I won the world's Stone Skimming Championship
item.description:
I travelled to Easdale Island in Scotland over the weekend where I took part in the world's Stone Skimming Championship. I entered with the idea of having some fun and getting to meet people. After seeing many people warm up I thought to myself I haven't a hope of making the final. Over 350 people took part in the competition and 15 made the final. https://youtube.com/shorts/MzUFjoRv2mk?si=EP6Bpr9fh8F-K9hp
Stones thrown have to be from the island and must measure no more the 3 inches in diameter. In the final you have 3 throws and your distance is combined from those 3 shots, your shots must stay inside the barriers also. Me and one other contestant both had the same score after 3 throws so we had a signal stone throw down, the rest is history.
This is a small clip of a practice shot from the morning of. I'm the 1st Irish person to win the competition and it just goes to show that if you're willing to give things a try you may be surprised with the outcome. This was my 1st competition and I came away the trophy and new friends. I've copied a link above to a short video of the day.
item.dc:creator: Masterleftspud

item.title: Thursday Phone Clearing DUMP (Mostly GAMING Memes & other geeky shit)
item.description:
1. MOM! SELL THE HOUSE
2. I think I might not upgrade to PS5 after all, PS4 is good enough.
3. Work smarter, not harder
4. Aw, look at the little guy sleeping
5. Everyone I know who played AC: Odyssey has picked Kassandra
6 Soul Trap: Successful. Candymaking has increased to 51.
7. Thanks Appl... I mean Sony
8. Animals having existential crisis
9. Future Man
10
11. My GF when I try to get some time on my gaming PC in the two hours before bed
12. Is that sausage or are you happy to see me.. oh
13. HOL UP
14. Hermione Morgan
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump. One last thing that I wanna share with you is when not making questionable life choices (like spending 80% of my time on Imgur) I'm working on a game of my own!It's kind of inspired by The Stanley Parable, or at least I'm going for same kind of wacky absurd humor. (which is quite ironic because I'm so unfunny IRL). But the jokes in the game are quite good (I told one to my mom and she sort of made a nostril sound, and also my dog starting wagging his tail - so what more proof do you need?) Anyway if you would like to support me and work please wishlist, it helps a lot cause I'm really effing tired of Ubisoft and EA and other greedy execs ruining gaming with their soulless products: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. 1 Check out more indie games on Steam it really helps small teams to shine, I really want to improve the industry! P.S. 2 The image here is from the game where you can find the embarrassing backstory of The Developer of the game (it's teased in the demo)

Guinness lamb stew
Lentil soup
Irish breakfast
Khachapuri
Steak with mandioca
Tapioca pancake
Irish stew
Oysters
seafood pie
Fish and chips
Clam chowder
Spinach and rolled eggplant
